what_it_does: Fast single-image 3D reconstruction using a hybrid triplane/Gaussian representation.
succinct_summary: Medium Morgan relevance as an older fast reconstruction baseline for image-to-3D avatar geometry.
possible_use: Reference for quick image-to-3D experiments when TripoSR/SG/SF are not appropriate.
important_notes: Research model, not rigging; generated geometry would still need rig/skin pipeline.
